root.title: Assistant skills
root.what: Assistant skill library: reusable task templates and reference docs.
root.when: Consult when deciding HOW to perform a multi-step task the user requested.

posts.title: Posts & publishing
posts.when: User wants to write, time, or publish post content.

posts.draft.title: Drafting a post
posts.draft.what: Template for composing new post body text from a prompt or outline.
posts.draft.when: User wants new post content written.

posts.schedule.title: Scheduling a post
posts.schedule.what: How to set the publish time for an already-written draft.
posts.schedule.when: User asks when an existing draft should go out.

links.why: related: both set a schedule/cadence for future runs

recurring.title: Recurring tasks
recurring.what: Creating repeating tasks and handling missed occurrences.
recurring.when: User wants something to repeat on a schedule, or to backfill missed runs.

recurring.create.title: Creating a recurring task
recurring.create.what: Define a repeating task and its cadence (daily/weekly/monthly).
recurring.create.when: User wants a task to repeat on a regular schedule.

recurring.catchup.title: Catching up missed runs
recurring.catchup.what: Backfill occurrences that were missed while the schedule lapsed.
recurring.catchup.when: User wants to recover or backfill recurring runs that did not fire.

research.title: Research
research.what: Gathering information from the web and synthesizing findings.
research.when: User wants to find external information or summarize what was found.

research.web.title: Web research
research.web.what: Run web searches and collect candidate sources for a question.
research.web.when: User wants to find or look up external information.

research.synthesize.title: Synthesizing findings
research.synthesize.what: Combine collected sources into a cited summary or report.
research.synthesize.when: User wants gathered information summarized into a report.

channels.title: Channels & messaging
channels.what: Posting to channels and sending direct messages.
channels.when: User wants to send a message to a channel or a person.

channels.post.title: Posting to a channel
channels.post.what: Send a message into a shared channel feed.
channels.post.when: User wants to broadcast a message to a channel.

channels.dm.title: Direct messaging
channels.dm.what: Send a private direct message to a single person.
channels.dm.when: User wants to message one teammate privately.
